summary: Completed end-to-end frontend testing of Space Convoy 3D MOT game. All 27+ required data-testid selectors are present and functional. Full game loop verified: welcome → start → game with phase progression (cue→isi→motion→response→feedback→gap) → pause → resume → pause → end session → summary → export JSON → play again → reset. No console/runtime errors detected (R3F craco exclusion fix is working).
critical_code_review_comments: Game.jsx is ~510 lines with trial state machine + scoring + adaptive + export all in one file. Consider extracting trial orchestration hook (useTrialMachine) and session logger. Acceptable for MVP but will grow hard to maintain.

In finalizeTrial, reactionTimesMs is computed from selectionTimesRef for only the ids still in selectionTimesRef, but after deselect the entry is deleted — good. However rts are written for all kept selections including commissions (non-targets). That is acceptable for logging but the naming 'reactionTimesMs' suggests hits only. Document this or filter.
useEffect on [screen] with phase check for re-trigger relies on object.length==0 && phase=='gap' — works but fragile. Consider a single explicit dispatcher.
WelcomeScreen nickname input uses id='nickname-input' AND data-testid='nickname-input' — fine; label htmlFor correctly targets id.

Pause flow: clicking Resume intentionally resets the current trial (setObjects([])). This discards any partial user selections/state — product decision, but the pause label 'Catch your breath' does not warn user that the trial will restart. Minor UX note.

No tests/lint for /src/game (frontend-only build). CRACO exclusion of /src/game/ from visual-edits babel plugin is critical — add a code comment in craco.config.js referencing the R3F prop pollution bug so future devs don't remove it.
Export filename uses Date.now() epoch; fine but not human-friendly. Consider ISO date.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full flow tested at 1080x1920 portrait viewport. Verified: welcome-screen renders, reduced-motion-toggle switches OFF/ON, start-mission-button defaults nickname to 'Pilot' when blank, all HUD testids visible (game-hud, score-display, score-value='0000', level-pill, level-number='1', target-count-display, pause-button, trial-counter), phase-badge transitions through LOCK ON TARGETS → TRACK THEM → TAP THE CONVOY, confirm-button appears during response phase with text 'CONFIRM' and disabled attribute, pause-overlay shows resume-button and end-session-button, end-session navigates to summary-screen with all stat cards (stat-final-score/trials/perfect-trials/accuracy/max-streak/stat-top-level), export-log-button triggers a JSON download (verified filename 'space-convoy-Pilot-<ts>.json'), play-again-button resets score to 0000 and returns to gameplay. Zero console errors or page errors. Canvas taps registered (clicked at canvas center + 5 offsets during response phase). Game stage visibly letter-boxes in 9:16 ratio. Not tested: full 12-trial completion to auto-summary (used End Session shortcut as suggested by main agent); actual hit/commission scoring (cannot reliably click specific 3D meshes without exposed world-to-screen coordinates — the randomized positions make this non-deterministic).
tests_executed: start-mission with empty nickname (defaults to Pilot)
confirm button visibility during response phase
